title: Session 002: end-to-end verification and docs
description: Add smoke upload script, architecture-frame verification docs, README verification section, and run final verification for the upload/list frame. This corresponds to Task 10 in the upload slice plan.
acceptance_criteria: make migrate-photo works; health endpoints respond; make smoke-upload prints smoke upload ok; manual browser check confirms uploaded JPEG appears as uploaded; verification docs describe commands and known limits.

title: Session 002: compose application services
description: Add Dockerfiles for all application services and extend Docker Compose to run web, api-gateway, photo-service, media-worker, cluster-service, publication-service, usage-service, and connector-service. This corresponds to Task 9 in the upload slice plan.
acceptance_criteria: docker compose build succeeds for all services; compose exposes web 3000, gateway 3001, photo-service 3002/50051, and scaffold service ports 3010-3014.

title: Session 002: web upload/list UI
description: Create the Next.js web package, API helper, layout, global styles, and minimal upload/list page for the first executable frame. This corresponds to Task 7 in the upload slice plan.
acceptance_criteria: Web builds; UI lets user select a JPEG, create upload intent through api-gateway, PUT directly to presigned MinIO URL, complete upload, and list uploaded photos.

title: Session 002: api-gateway HTTP facade
description: Implement NestJS api-gateway package with health endpoint, HTTP photo controller, gRPC photo client, global error filter, app module, and main bootstrap. This corresponds to Task 6 in the upload slice plan.
acceptance_criteria: Gateway builds; /photos upload-intents, complete-upload, and list endpoints delegate to photo-service over gRPC; api-gateway contains no database connection strings.

title: Session 002: photo-service implementation
description: Implement the photo-service domain service, repository, MinIO storage adapter, gRPC controller, app module, main bootstrap, and health endpoint. This corresponds to Task 5 in the upload slice plan.
acceptance_criteria: PhotoDomainService tests pass; photo-service builds; photo-service connects only to PHOTO_DATABASE_URL and MinIO; CompleteUpload verifies object existence and marks status uploaded.

title: Session 002: photo-service schema and tests
description: Create photo-service package, TypeScript config, photo_assets migration/schema/types, and initial unit tests for upload validation and complete-upload behavior. This corresponds to Task 4 in the upload slice plan.
acceptance_criteria: photo-service package and schema files exist; unit tests define JPEG-only upload, 25 MB limit, upload intent creation, and missing object completion failure; initial red test behavior is captured per plan.
close_reason: Task 4 photo-service schema and RED tests verified and reviewed

title: Session 002: local infrastructure runtime
description: Add Docker Compose infrastructure for Postgres, MinIO, MinIO bucket init, and RabbitMQ, including database bootstrap SQL with separate database/user pairs. This corresponds to Task 3 in the upload slice plan.
acceptance_criteria: docker compose starts postgres/minio/minio-init/rabbitmq; database isolation query returns cluster_db, connector_db, photo_db, publication_db, usage_db.
close_reason: Task 3 local infrastructure runtime verified and reviewed

title: Session 002: proto contracts and TS generation
description: Add Buf configuration, common/photo/domain proto contracts, and @photoops/proto-ts package shell for generated TypeScript support. This corresponds to Task 2 in the upload slice plan.
acceptance_criteria: Proto files exist for photo, cluster, publication, usage, connector, and common; pnpm install and pnpm proto generate TypeScript files under packages/proto-ts/src.
close_reason: Task 2 proto contracts and TypeScript generation verified and reviewed

title: Session 002: root tooling and docs frame
description: Create the root monorepo frame for the first executable PhotoOps architecture slice: package.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml, .env.example, Makefile, README, architecture docs, roadmap, and ADR. This corresponds to Task 1 in docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-21-architecture-frame-upload-slice.md.
acceptance_criteria: Root workspace files exist; README documents upload/list frame; Makefile contains install/proto/build/test/lint/dev/down/logs/status/migrate-photo/smoke-upload commands; verification command from plan exits 0.
close_reason: Task 1 root tooling and documentation frame verified and reviewed

title: Session 002: remaining service scaffolds
description: Create health-only scaffolds for media-worker, cluster-service, publication-service, usage-service, and connector-service with explicit 501 responses for non-health paths. This corresponds to Task 8 in the upload slice plan.
acceptance_criteria: All scaffold services have package/module files; health endpoints return status ok; unimplemented paths return 501/not_implemented; TypeScript scaffolds build and Go scaffold tests.
